ShortDescription.Value: Hide notification icons, track money trends, set milestones, add/remove money, achievements.

Publish.LongDescription:
- City Watchdog helps reduce city alert icon clutter and adds convenient city setup tools. - It is modeled on the original City Controller mod (retired) and has many expanded features.
### Features
- Show or hide notification alert icons. - Built-in Achievement Fixer and achievement repair tools. - Change the MilesStone you start with (if you want Trains now, you can have it!).
#### Money
- Manual add/subtract money controls using hotkeys. - Automatic add money option. - Trend Tracker for money/population toolbar values. - Convert saves from Unlimited money type to normal Limited money.
Hotkeys - N = toggle all notification icons on/off. - [ = Add Money - ] = Subtract Money
### Important Notes - City Watchdog hides/shows alert icons; it does not fix the city problem behind the icons. Good for making videos and reducing stress. - Make a backup before converting an Unlimited Money save. Mod cannot undo that conversion. - You can remove any separate Achievement Fixer mod if you use this mod.
### Support and feedback Feedback is welcome through GitHub or Discord links on the right. If you like free mods, give a Like, easy way to show support :)
### Future - New 9 languages supported, more needed. - If anyone can make better Thumbnail and screenshots, please let me know.
### Credits - River Mochi - mod author and maintainer - Thanks to Mbyron26 for the original City Controller mod - Dorkington, Flightech, SonNathan - testers - Thumbnail photograph by Maryia Shedava at Mont Saint-Michel in Normandy, France https://unsplash.com/photos/a-dog-poses-in-front-of-a-distant-castle-bEpjaU_CTcM
